quote_of_day.text: China. Shows body discovery of 25 year old young woman who died as the result of erotic asphyxiation. Worked as a medical nurse and online model. Lubricated vibrator was found lying at her feet. Her va-ginal and an-al passages had the same lubricant in them.
quote_of_day.name: Anon

guest_letters.title: Send your articles to the East of Indus newspaper
guest_letters.body: By adding the prefix !eastofindus to your post, and writing your title after that, you can send an article through induschan, which will be published on iac and displayed in the next edition of the newspaper, in the morning or the evening! There is no censorship, there is quality control, and there is a 50 word minimum, send your writing!!!
guest_letters.name: India Abstract Culture

articles.title: Weather for Indus today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of erotic asphyxiation cases moved into the board's discussion area, bringing with it a torrent of related images and anecdotes. The system lingered, fueled by Anon's fascination with the morbid details.

A scattered high-pressure ridge of self-improvement chatter developed, as one anon inquired about the possibility of an 'Incel to Chad transformation in 2 months.' The query drew a series of skeptical replies and jests, which dispersed the ridge by mid-morning.

A brief fog of obscure references rolled in, marked by mentions of 'Gobarida edition' and a bizarre scenario involving a RAW agent in a small town.

The fog burned off quickly, leaving behind a clear but somber atmosphere.

articles.title: Erotic asphyxiation cases discussed on imageboard
articles.body:
Anon opened a thread sharing a case of a 24-year-old Onlyfans and PornHub erotic gay model who died during a livestream in Italy during the COVID-19 pandemic.

The model was using a high-quality pirated VPN, which delayed the discovery of his location and corpse by at least 24 hours.

Another anon shared a case from a 2004 German Forensic Medicine textbook, where a 24-year-old man intentionally caused the death of his 28-year-old gay partner during a strangulation fetish session.

The perpetrator was acting as a safe spotter but encouraged the partner to push the session further. Anon also shared a case of a 23-year-old woman who died while engaging in erotic asphyxiation with her male partner as a spotter.

The partner had waited too long to intervene, leaving her hanging for an entire minute while he masturbated.

Other cases discussed included an 18-year-old man who streamed his own death on an erotic platform, and a 27-year-old man who died while streaming on LiveJasmin, wearing a condom.

A viewer had requested the 18-year-old to masturbate while hanging himself, and he used a bed sheet to create a makeshift rope.

Anons discussed the possible reasons behind the arousal some people experience from hanging or strangulation, with one suggesting that the brain deprived of blood can create a hallucinogenic effect, leading to powerful orgasms.

Some anons shared their own experiences, with one stating that they had been watching gore since they were 13 but found hanging videos to be particularly uncomfortable.

The thread also touched on the topic of how people discover their affinity for autoerotic asphyxiation, with one anon suggesting that it often starts with exposure to such acts in movies or online content.

Anons also debated the motivations behind such acts, with some speculating that it could be a form of masochism induced by past traumas.

As the discussion progressed, some anons expressed discomfort with the thread's content, with one stating that it was painful to read and another suggesting that those who were uncomfortable could simply watch other threads.

articles.title: Incel to Chad Transformation in 2 Months
articles.body:
Anon opened a thread asking how to achieve an 'Incel to Chad transformation in 2 months.' One respondent suggested that getting in shape was possible within that timeframe, but changing personality was harder, especially for those who are autistic.

Another anon recommended a high-carb diet and exercise, specifying at least 200 grams of simple carbs daily.

A different approach was offered by an anon who advised against using labels like 'randi' and instead to view promiscuous women as simply that, to enhance chances of 'banging one.' Anon also joked about getting a vasectomy, saying it's not worth having a child in this economy.

Some anons engaged in a conversation about underwear, with one explaining the difference between thongs and G-strings.

Anon also discussed learning and personal growth, with one asking how to learn the first 100 terms of the Fibonacci sequence and another inquiring about 'charming pretty boy Chad vibes.' The thread also included some off-topic conversations, including one about posting content and another about the use of spoilers for NSFW content.

Anon concluded with some joking and sarcastic remarks, including one who claimed to already be 'Chad' and seeking advice on what to do next.

articles.title: Gobarida Edition Mentioned
articles.body: Anon started a thread with the phrase "Gobarida edition". Anon sought clarification on what "Gobarida Edition" refers to, suggesting possibilities such as a book or product edition. Another anon expressed desire for a "robo waifu" and criticized 3D "Randis." One respondent joked about a hypothetical "Gobarida" being a knockoff brand. Anon also fantasized about demographics changing, with a male-to-female ratio shift and increased fertility rates.

articles.title: RAW Agent Meets Anon in Small Town
articles.body:
Yui started a story about a 6'4 burly man from the R&AW digital investigation wing showing up at an anon’s doorstep on a quiet Saturday afternoon.

He claimed it was a private matter and not to worry about trouble. The anon was taken outside to a car, where a regular-looking man was driving, and they discussed a possible reward for cooperation.

Later, another poster, yui, mentioned that the board owner, dayush, might be funded by an external entity and referenced a topological map of a lodge in Ladakh.

Anon speculated that dayush, or dyaush, created a communication tool called bharatchan. Another poster joked about the conversation taking a wild turn.
